title: Shared Views with Mirrored Columns
excerpt:

posts.author: Adurm (Adam Cranch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I have a dashboard view that I am sharing via a URL. It looks as though the Mirrored columns are not showing at the public link.

We are Mirroring “Status” columns and they are not showing at the URL. They are also not contributing to the charts at the URL. Both work fine when viewing from within Monday

posts.author: dak (David Karpiak)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a limitation of shared views. However, I would like to see mirror columns included since this would make shared views much more valuable.

posts.author: JustinSeed (Justin Seed)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want the option to make mirrored columns viewable on a shared view of a board.
